name: Yushin Precision Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Yushin Precision Equipment Co., Ltd. develops, produces, sells, and maintains take-out robots for injection-molded products and peripheral equipment in Japan, Europe, China, Taiwan, North America, rest of Asia, and internationally. Its primary products include take-out robots for injection molding machines; labor-saving automation equipment; and automated stocker systems, as well as other industrial equipment and systems for automating and streamlining the operation of plastic injection molding plants. The company also offers palletizing robots; custom-designed end-of-arm tools; stock systems, such as stockers and conveyors; and downstream equipment, including gate cutting systems, automated packaging systems, and insert workpiece feeders. In addition, it provides custom-ordered equipment; and parts and maintenance services. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
